zh.Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England,: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Ashton II於1340年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，他的父親Sir John De Assheton Knt35歲，母親Margaret Assheton de Legh16歲。他於1342年與Margaret Lady of Macclesfield Cheshire de LEE Legh在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林結婚。他去世於1403年在英國諾圖波藍德諾哈姆享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Ashton II was born in 1340, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John De Assheton Knt, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Assheton de Legh, was 16. He married Margaret Lady of Macclesfield Cheshire de LEE Legh in 1342, in Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1403, in Norham, Northumberland, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Ashton II est né en 1340, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John De Assheton Knt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Assheton de Legh, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lady of Macclesfield Cheshire de LEE Legh en 1342, à Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1403, à Norham, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ko.Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Ashton II(이)가 1340년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John De Assheton Knt(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Assheton de Legh(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니에서 Margaret Lady of Macclesfield Cheshire de LEE Legh(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1403년 영국 노르스벌랜드 노르함에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Ashton II родился в 1340 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John De Assheton Knt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Assheton de Legh, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lady of Macclesfield Cheshire de LEE Legh в 1342 г. в местности аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1403 г. в местности норам, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
